corrections_by_claim.note: API pricing and model performance are outcome-level metrics; they do not reveal whether the underlying R&D was productive investment or rent-seeking.
No analysis of the source of revenue or the role of data extraction.
The article describes the state as a regulator and geopolitical competitor, not as the constitutive force that built the firms' capital structure.
No discussion of profit rates or equalization.
No engagement with the exploitation vs. expropriation framework.
